'''鈭歵h-ng-j''' ('''kathangaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hele|hele]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hele|hele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kathangaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangaj|thithangaj]] || [[word:jithangaj|jithangaj]] || [[word:shithangaj|shithangaj]] || [[word:kithangaj|kithangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangaj|thuthuthangaj]] || [[word:jujuthangaj|jujuthangaj]] || [[word:shushuthangaj|shushuthangaj]] || [[word:kukuthangaj|kukuthangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthangaj|thuthangaj]] || [[word:juthangaj|juthangaj]] || [[word:shuthangaj|shuthangaj]] || [[word:kuthangaj|kuthangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthangaj|thuthangaj]] || [[word:juthangaj|juthangaj]] || [[word:shuthangaj|shuthangaj]] || [[word:kuthangaj|kuthangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethangaj|thethangaj]] || [[word:jethangaj|jethangaj]] || [[word:shethangaj|shethangaj]] || [[word:kethangaj|kethangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothangaj|thothothangaj]] || [[word:jojothangaj|jojothangaj]] || [[word:shoshothangaj|shoshothangaj]] || [[word:kokothangaj|kokothangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangaj|thothangaj]] || [[word:jothangaj|jothangaj]] || [[word:shothangaj|shothangaj]] || [[word:kothangaj|kothangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangaj|thothangaj]] || [[word:jothangaj|jothangaj]] || [[word:shothangaj|shothangaj]] || [[word:kothangaj|kothangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thangaj|th忙thangaj]] || [[word:j忙thangaj|j忙thangaj]] || [[word:sh忙thangaj|sh忙thangaj]] || [[word:k忙thangaj|k忙thangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangaj|thathathangaj]] || [[word:jajathangaj|jajathangaj]] || [[word:shashathangaj|shashathangaj]] || [[word:kakathangaj|kakathangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangaj|thathangaj]] || [[word:jathangaj|jathangaj]] || [[word:shathangaj|shathangaj]] || [[word:kathangaj|kathangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangaj|thathangaj]] || [[word:jathangaj|jathangaj]] || [[word:shathangaj|shathangaj]] || [[word:kathangaj|kathangaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathangaj|shathangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathangaj|goshathangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathangaj|gokishathangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathangajn眉|shathangajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathangajnkn眉|goshathangajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangajn眉|gokishathangajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathangajsh毛|shathangajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathangajnksh毛|goshathangajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathangajsh毛|gokishathangajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangajro|shathangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangajnkro|goshathangajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangajro|gokishathangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangajmu|shathangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangajnkmu|goshathangajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangajmu|gokishathangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathangajsher|shathangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathangajnksher|goshathangajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathangajsher|gokishathangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathangajng|shathangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathangajnkng|goshathangajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathangajng|gokishathangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathangajya|shathangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathangajnkya|goshathangajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathangajya|gokishathangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathangajyam|shathangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathangajnkyam|goshathangajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathangajyam|gokishathangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangajn眉sh毛|shathangajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangajnkn眉sh毛|goshathangajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangajn眉sh毛|gokishathangajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangajn眉ro|shathangajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangajnkn眉ro|goshathangajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangajn眉ro|gokishathangajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangajn眉mu|shathangajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangajnkn眉mu|goshathangajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangajn眉mu|gokishathangajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangajsh毛n眉|shathangajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangajnksh毛n眉|goshathangajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangajsh毛n眉|gokishathangajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangajsh毛ro|shathangajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangajnksh毛ro|goshathangajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangajsh毛ro|gokishathangajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangajsh毛mu|shathangajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangajnksh毛mu|goshathangajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangajsh毛mu|gokishathangajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangajron眉|shathangajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangajnkron眉|goshathangajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangajron眉|gokishathangajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangajrosh毛|shathangajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangajnkrosh毛|goshathangajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangajrosh毛|gokishathangajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathangajromu|shathangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathangajnkromu|goshathangajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathangajromu|gokishathangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathangajmun眉|shathangajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathangajnkmun眉|goshathangajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathangajmun眉|gokishathangajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathangajmush毛|shathangajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathangajnkmush毛|goshathangajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathangajmush毛|gokishathangajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathangajmuro|shathangajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathangajnkmuro|goshathangajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathangajmuro|gokishathangajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
